title: centaurea lingulata
intro: Centaurea lingulata, also known as the lingulate knapweed, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the mountainous regions of South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Centaurea lingulata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat skin conditions and wounds.
